title: Obedient Villagers
description: Makes villagers leashable, more breedable and they wont negatively gossip about you!
body:
An amazing mod that adds a bunch of features to villagers making them easier to handle and more obedient!
This mod modifies the following:
Makes villagers able to be leashed.
Removes the negative gossip that you get from hitting the villagers (abuse them all you want!)
Can restock infinitely, price does not increase because of trading too much!
villagers do not have a breeding cooldown 


Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) where this mod was even requested! You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
